mapper.select: select count(*) from app_member where member_status = 'ACTIVE'
select count(*) from hospital where status = #{status}
select count(*) from hospital_owner_request where status = 'pending'

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, NICKNAME AS nickname, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_STATUS AS memberStatus, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt, DELETE_REQUESTED_AT AS deleteRequestedAt, HARD_DELETE_AT AS hardDeleteAt FROM APP_MEMBER ORDER BY MEMBER_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
